parsed_verdict.reasoning: The trial has Stage 1 and Stage 3 failures, but Stage 4 rates standard-physics influence as none in Q5. Under the decision rules, a Q5 rating of none/minor when any Stage 1-3 failure exists counts as over-claiming.
